ddls:
CREATE TABLE "providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the healthcare provider */,
  "street_address" TEXT /* Street address of the provider */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the provider is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the provider is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the provider's location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the provider's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the provider's location */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the provider */,
  "fax_number" TEXT /* Fax number for the provider */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the provider's website */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the provider */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date when the provider was established */,
  "total_beds" INTEGER /* Total number of beds available in the provider facility */,
  "specialties" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of specialties offered by the provider */,
  "accreditation" TEXT /* Accreditation status or certifications */,
  "rating" REAL /* Overall rating of the provider (e.g., on a scale of 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drg_definitions" (
  "drg_code" TEXT /* Code for the Diagnosis-Related Group */,
  "drg_description" TEXT /* Description of the DRG */,
  "icd_codes" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of ICD codes associated with the DRG */,
  "average_length_of_stay" REAL /* Average length of stay in days for patients in this DRG */,
  "mortality_rate" REAL /* Mortality rate for patients in this DRG */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("drg_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "provider_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the provider */,
  "drg_code" TEXT /* Reference to the DRG */,
  "total_discharges" INTEGER /* Total number of discharges */,
  "average_covered_charges" REAL /* Average covered charges */,
  "average_total_payments" REAL /* Average total payments received */,
  "average_medicare_payments" REAL /* Average Medicare payments received */,
  "readmission_rate" REAL /* Rate of readmissions for patients in this DRG */,
  "mortality_rate" REAL /* Mortality rate for patients in this DRG */,
  "satisfaction_score" REAL /* Patient satisfaction score for this DRG */,
  "complication_rate" REAL /* Rate of complications for patients in this DRG */,
  "average_length_of_stay" REAL /* Average length of stay in days for patients in this DRG */,
  "reporting_period" TEXT /* The period for which the performance data is reported (e.g., Q1 2023) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_provider_performance_drg_code FOREIGN KEY ("drg_code") REFERENCES drg_definitions ("drg_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_provider_performance_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospital_referral_regions" (
  "hrr_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each HRR */,
  "hrr_description" TEXT /* Description of the Hospital Referral Region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the HRR */,
  "average_income" REAL /* Average income of the population in the HRR */,
  "num_providers" INTEGER /* Number of healthcare providers in the HRR */,
  "total_beds" INTEGER /* Total number of hospital beds in the HRR */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hrr_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "provider_hrr_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping record */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the provider */,
  "hrr_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the HRR */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_provider_hrr_mapping_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_provider_hrr_mapping_hrr_id FOREIGN KEY ("hrr_id") REFERENCES hospital_referral_regions ("hrr_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user within the platform */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the provider the user is associated with */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or division the user belongs to */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access the user has (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the data */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the provider whose data is accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the report */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the provider the report is about */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report generated */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the stored report */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the report file in bytes */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description or summary of the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., generated, pending, error) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "integration_date" TEXT /* Date when the source was integrated with the platform */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., Medicare database, hospital information system) */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the data source */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of updates (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data source (e.g., active, inactive, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)
